CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Lesley Settle. CSR #10580 (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-20-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrea M. Christensen, Esq. of MCKASSON, KLEIN 209/466-6022, for defendant James Townsend, moving for summary judgment
Donald E. Krentsa, Esq. of MEISEL & KRENTSA 788-2035, for plaintiff and opposing party

Ruling:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT JAMES TOWNSEND'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- denied as to motion to summary judgment and summary adjudication. Court finds duty existed, triable issue of fact re whether defendant breached the duty of care and whether breach caused injuries. Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/PHA/PB) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, CSR: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629
